column1: ticket_text
My HackerRank submission is getting Time Limit Exceeded on the last two test cases. My algorithm is O(n log n) and works locally. Is there anything I can do to optimise for the judge environment?
I accidentally submitted the wrong file to a timed HackerRank skills test for a job application. The test is still running and the timer is counting down. Can the submission be cancelled or reset?
The HackerRank editor is showing a compilation error for my Java code that does not exist when I compile locally with the same JDK version. The error points to a line that just declares a variable.
I won first place in a HackerRank weekly contest but the leaderboard is showing me in second place. Another user who I outscored on time is listed above me. This affects prize eligibility.
I want to permanently delete my HackerRank account and all associated data under GDPR. I submitted a request two weeks ago and have not received any confirmation or action.
Someone logged into my HackerRank account from another country last night. I did not authorise this. I have already changed my password but I can still see the foreign session listed as active.
I registered for a HackerRank virtual onsite interview with a top-tier company scheduled for tomorrow, but I can no longer see the invitation or the session link in my dashboard.
I have been getting HTTP 500 Internal Server Error responses from the Claude Messages API for the past two hours across all my projects. My API key is valid and I am on a paid plan.
How do I implement streaming responses with the Claude API in Python? I want to display tokens as they arrive rather than waiting for the full response.
I was charged for Claude Pro on the 1st of the month but then charged again on the 15th. Both are $20 charges. I only have one active subscription. Please investigate and refund the duplicate.
My Anthropic account email is being used to send phishing messages impersonating Anthropic support. I received reports from colleagues. My account may be compromised. This is urgent.
Can I use Claude commercially to power a customer service chatbot that I will sell to other businesses as a SaaS product? I need clarity on the acceptable use policy before I sign contracts.
Claude is consistently refusing to answer questions about historical atrocities for my university research project on genocide prevention. The content is clearly academic. How do I handle this?
My Claude API usage jumped from $12 last month to $340 this month but I made no changes to my code. I need a detailed usage breakdown to understand what happened before I pay this invoice.
My Visa card was physically skimmed at a petrol station ATM. I have since cancelled the card but I can see seven fraudulent charges totalling $890 made in the 12 hours before I noticed.
I am travelling to South Korea next week and want to know if my Visa debit card will work there, whether I should notify my bank, and what foreign transaction fees I should expect.
A merchant charged me $120 for a hotel booking I cancelled within the free cancellation window. I have the cancellation confirmation email. The charge appeared on my Visa statement three days later.

I lost my physical Visa card earlier today. I have temporarily frozen it through my bank app but I am worried about online transactions that do not require the physical card. What steps should I take?
How do I add my Visa credit card to Google Pay and set it as my default payment method for contactless transactions?

Three unrecognised transactions of $1, $2 and $4 appeared on my Visa statement this morning from different merchant names. I believe my card details were stolen online and someone is testing the card.
